title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum
summary: Students create a brand for Charlotte Hawkins Brown's Canary Cottage, celebrating its 100th anniversary in Guilford County, NC.

title: FG Nexus CEO to Speak at FII Priority Miami 2026
summary: FG Nexus CEO Maja Vujinovic will co-chair the digital assets conclave and speak on a stablecoins panel at FII Priority Miami 2026.

title: Virginia Defeats NC State in ACC Tournament
summary: No. 10 Virginia beats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season to advance in the ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Significant win for Virginia in a high-profile tournament held in Charlotte, impacting local sports fans.

summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats N.C. State 81- in the ACC Tournament in Charlotte, continuing their winning streak against the Wolfpack.

title: Weapons Found in Kindergarten Student's Backpack
summary: A pistol and knife were found in a kindergarten student's backpack at an Indian Land school; student unaware.

summary: A woman found shot in a car on Elizabeth Avenue in Albemarle dies after being airlifted to the hospital.

summary: Fire officials warn of heightened wildfire risk across North Carolina due to dry, windy conditions; no statewide burn ban in place.

title: SC Tax Filing Deadline Extended, Payment Still Due
